programme.title: The Bold and the Beautiful
programme.desc: Separately, Will and Ivy share their opinions with Electra; Ridge reminds R.J. not to bring his personal life to the office.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Word of Anita's latest medical news travels throughout the Dupree family; Andre comforts Dani; Tomas surprises Kat on her birthday; Ted honors tradition with Nicole; Leslie has a warning for Hayley.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Bryan Cranston talks about coming back for the "Malcolm in the Middle" reboot, his daughter starring in "The Pitt," and some of his most iconic roles over the years.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Lauren Conrad tells Drew about reuniting with former castmates for the "Laguna Beach" 20th anniversary reunion special.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.sub-title: Vindictive Roommate Games; Thriving Hair Salon Runaround!; Attacked by a Yorkie!
programme.desc: A man admits to calling his roommate's probation officer to speed up his eviction; a woman accuses her sister of defrauding her in the sale of a hair salon; a woman says a tiny dog bit her.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.sub-title: Good Samaritan Twice Bitten!; Stop Playing With Your Hair!
programme.desc: A neighbor injured while breaking up a dog fight winds up getting blamed rather than thanked; the judge chides an irresponsible young woman for ripping off her grandmother and being improperly groomed for court.

programme.desc: Join the CBS LA team for stories from communities around SoCal, breaking news from The Desk, and NEXT Weather from the Weathersphere.

programme.title: Inside Edition
programme.desc: His family claims that he went in to have his spleen removed, but the doctor mistakenly removed his liver instead.

programme.title: Entertainment Tonight
programme.desc: News and features about performers, productions and the milieu.

programme.title: Survivor
programme.sub-title: Double the Fun, Double the Demise
programme.desc: A boat arrives asking the tribe to divide themselves into pairs; a theatrical risk taken at tribal council must be enough to cast doubt upon those on the chopping block.

programme.title: America's Culinary Cup
programme.desc: The chefs showcase different molecular gastronomy techniques while creating as many dishes as they can in five hours.

programme.title: CBS News Roundup
programme.desc: The headlines one needs to know overnight... plus, a roundup of MoneyWatch, health, consumer and up-to-the-minute technology news, the latest weather, and inspiring stories of kindness and hope.

programme.title: CBS News Mornings
programme.desc: CBS News Mornings broadcasts on weekdays and offers viewers up-to-date news, comprehensive weather forecasts, and highlights from the world of sports.

programme.desc: Jack leans on Nikki; Adam forces Matt Clark's hand; Sally's patience is tested.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Jacob gets taught a rough lesson; Martin encourages Nicole to repair a fractured friendship; Joey issues an edict to Randy; Hayley celebrates a win; Chelsea and Kat worry their latest business success could get derailed due to Madison's lawsuit.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: "Entertainment Tonight" correspondent Emily Curl hits the Drew's News desk with Drew and Ross Mathews.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Paul Walter Hauser tells Drew about his new movie, "Balls Up.".

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.sub-title: Shih Tzu Shuttling!; Pit Bull Collateral Damage!
programme.desc: A woman is accused of refusing to return a dog to its rightful owner; neighbors fight over liability after a pit bull charges a woman and her daughter, forcing her to jump onto a car and damage it.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.sub-title: Skateboard Boy Wonder; Mud-Dragging, Big Tipper?!
programme.desc: A gifted youngster neglects to tell his father that he has been accused of vandalizing a neighbor's property; a hair-salon client accidentally tips her stylist more than $200, then is accused of slandering his business on the internet.

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: Needing to raise a large sum of money to pay the IRS, Sam and Jay agree to host a high-stakes poker game at the mansion; in an act of generosity, Sass and Pete gift Jay's recliner to the basement ghosts.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: As the team continues tracing Senior's money trail, they arrange a delicate meeting with a key accomplice, one that could expose them all; the team takes on a criminal justice student's personal case involving a hit and run.

programme.title: Ready for a safer shower? Enjoy a one-day bath remodel with Jacuzzi.
